title: Trump says intelligence chief pick’s hearing is off and Pulte will remain for now
description: The president linked the move to his efforts to pass voting restrictions and said Jay Clayton’s hearing would be delayed until his replacement as U.S. attorney is confirmed.

title: After draping White House in gold, Trump heads to ‘the real deal’: Versailles
description: The president was set to leave France — until he was invited to the palace that has inspired his construction projects, including the White House ballroom.

title: Four takeaways from primaries in Georgia, Alabama and Oklahoma
description: Trump-endorsed candidates won Senate runoffs in Georgia and Alabama, but in a rare defeat, the president’s pick for Georgia governor failed to advance.

title: President Trump calls to delay nomination of intel pick Jay Clayton
description: The Senate was set to begin the confirmation process for Jay Clayton as Director of National Intelligence Today. But President Trump is calling for a delay.

title: With Iran deal, Trump told ships to 'start your engines.' That's not happening yet
description: Iran's control of the Strait of Hormuz inflicted global pain during the months-long conflict with the U.S. and Israel. A tentative deal is in place, but questions remain about the key waterway.

title: Trump's Iran agreement dominates G7 but big questions remain
description: The U.S.-Israel-led war in Iran has rocked the global economy and decimated Trump's standing at home

title: Trump's pick for director of national security faces Senate confirmation hearing
description: The Senate Intelligence Committee is set to consider the nomination of Jay Clayton to be the next director of national security.

title: Five arrested, charged with plotting to attack UFC event at White House, DOJ says
description: Officials alleged that plotters discussed sending explosive-loaded drones to the event and shooting people who fled.

title: Haitian immigrants ask Supreme Court to toss case in light of new evidence
description: The lawyers argue that the court does not have a full record of how the Trump administration decided to end temporary protective status for Haitians in the U.S.

title: Georgia results: Collins will face Sen. Ossoff; Trump's pick loses governor runoff
description: In an upset, Georgia Republican voters rejected President Trump's preferred nominee for the competitive open governor's race. They also picked Rep. Mike Collins to face Sen. Jon Ossoff.

title: Trump's Iran agreement takes center stage at G7 summit
description: President Trump said the next stage of negotiations with Iran should be easier than the first as he continues to tout the recent agreement between the two countries at the G7 summit in France.

title: South Carolina GOP isn’t sold on Trump’s candidate. He may endorse a second.
description: An endorsement of both candidates would be the latest example of the president hedging his bets to avoid a fight with conservative activists.

title: A UFC watch party in Pennsylvania shows the fallout from the Iran war
description: The frustration of a young crowd at a Buffalo Wild Wings in Pennsylvania shows why President Donald Trump was under pressure to end the conflict.

title: Israeli ambassador to U.S. says Israel is 'not going to withdraw from South Lebanon'
description: NPR's Steve Inskeep asks Israel's ambassador to the U.S. Michael Leiter about the peace deal the Trump administration says it's made with Iran.

title: Voting officials fear DHS may actually be a threat to elections this year
description: Voting officials worry that the Department of Homeland Security will not be a partner helping to secure elections, but rather a threat seeking to undermine results that President Trump dislikes.

title: California Gov. Gavin Newsom says DOJ is investigating him and his wife
description: California's Democratic Gov. Gavin Newsom says the Trump administration is targeting him and his wife with an investigation because he could be a presidential contender.

title: How Anthropic lost the White House’s trust — and then its flagship product
description: The Trump administration weighed export controls on Anthropic weeks before forcing its AI model offline, after a dispute over sharing its technology with a China-linked firm.

title: Democrats have a one-word defense for supporting Graham Platner: Trump
description: Platner’s backers in Maine say with Trump in office and Senate control on the line, the bar is low and the stakes are high: “Purity politics don’t get us anywhere.”

title: The White House UFC fights showed us the America we needed to see
description: The UFC extravaganza at the White House was not a celebration of a sport, it was a celebration of slop. We have always been a violent country, but have we always been such a shameless one?
